expectations.text: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
expectations.evidence: Single dashboard.html, only external dependency is Chart.js via CDN script tag; no build step.

expectations.text: Includes at least one KPI card showing a progress/completion percentage from the source data
expectations.evidence: DASHBOARD_DATA.kpis includes 'Overall Project Progress' (45%) and 'AI Chatbot Completion' (65%), matching source Metric/Value table.

expectations.text: Includes a progress bar element for at least one completion percentage
expectations.evidence: DASHBOARD_DATA.progress has 3 entries (Overall Progress 45%, Chatbot Completion 65%, Budget Used 45%), rendered via the template's progress-track/progress-fill bars.

expectations.text: Includes a risk table listing the 3 risks from the source sheet with a status indicator per row (At Risk / Watching / On Track)
expectations.evidence: tables[0] = 'Top Risks' with 3 rows, statusPill:true column; mentions of At Risk/Watching/On Track all present in output.

expectations.text: All numeric values in the output (budget figures, percentages) match values derivable from the source workbook, not invented numbers
expectations.evidence: Budget Remaining ($151,250) = 275,000 - 123,750, matching source rows exactly; KPI percentages match source Metric/Value table verbatim.

expectations.text: Includes some visualization (chart or bar) of team utilization across the 3 teams
expectations.evidence: charts[0] = 'Team Utilization' bar chart with 3 data points (AI 90%, IT 68%, Support 35%), plus a supporting notes table.
